name: GaugeFlow P4 matched production-backbone comparison v1
purpose: After, and only after, the exact P5 synthetic control passes, compare tensor representations in the same coordinate-flow production backbone with matched parameter capacity, budget, panel, random seeds and sampler budget.

precondition.failure_rule: If P5 does not pass, do not start this comparison; diagnose the conditional geometry substrate instead.

shared_backbone.sample_noise: common across methods and across representatives within each target orbit

methods.role: all six direct polar-vector Clebsch--Gordan paths
proper-SO(3) condition invariants without a response field
uniform finite-orbit pooling without coherent frame selection
early invariant token plus harmonic relative alignment

decision_rule: This is a representation comparison only after P5 has qualified conditional control. It cannot activate real piezo v2, a learned oracle, relaxation, DFT, DFPT, or a full 4,000/499/499 run.
